channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — April 10, 2026
item.description: Good morning. Welcome to The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and today is Friday, April 10, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — April 09, 2026
item.description: A fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran faces immediate tests, raising concerns about regional stability. US President Trump discusses potential NATO withdrawal amid European skepticism. And in the Czech Republic, a major EU subsidy fr...

item.title: The VENCAst — April 07, 2026
item.description: President Trump issues a Tuesday deadline to Iran, threatening devastating strikes as regional tensions escalate. Ukraine proposes an energy ceasefire amidst deadly Russian attacks. And the Artemis II mission achieves a new human distance record beyo...
